text.title: spatial-design-tools Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: visionOS + Quest cross-platform MR sketch app — Unity prototype, USDZ primary + glTF secondary.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Two-platform MR sketch app. Phase = prototype. Team has Unity background; visionOS via PolySpatial.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. Engineering bootstraps Unity project with PolySpatial; conversion glTF→USDZ baked into CI.
